series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports generated from Treasurer''s computer system that list all agency collateral transactions and activity within a given month. This report lists information for all pledges, releases, increases or decreases in pledge amounts, and updates to records resulting from submission of Account Verification Request Forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of fiscal year in which the report was generated, plus an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred
